precondition: instruction.opcode == add && rhs == 0
rewrite: replace (add x, 0) with x

precondition: instruction.opcode == mul && rhs == 1
rewrite: replace (mul x, 1) with x

precondition: instruction.opcode == xor && operands are the same value
rewrite: replace (xor x, x) with 0

precondition: instruction.opcode == sub && rhs == 0
rewrite: replace (sub x, 0) with x

precondition: instruction.opcode == or && rhs == 0
rewrite: replace (or x, 0) with x

precondition: instruction.opcode == and && rhs == -1
rewrite: replace (and x, -1) with x

precondition: instruction.opcode == and && operands are the same value
rewrite: replace (and x, x) with x

precondition: instruction is dead and has no observable effect
rewrite: remove the dead instruction

precondition: global initializer is proven unobservable
rewrite: replace the global initializer with a default null initializer

precondition: block is unreachable from entry
rewrite: remove the unreachable block

precondition: single branch diamond with a merge value
rewrite: fold the diamond to an equivalent selected value

precondition: nested branch shape with a merge value
rewrite: fold nested branches while preserving selected value

precondition: switch-like branch chain with equivalent case values
rewrite: fold branch chain while preserving selected value

precondition: alloca has bounded local uses and can be promoted
rewrite: replace stack slot traffic with SSA values

precondition: load reads a dominating store to the same slot
rewrite: replace load with the stored value

precondition: store is never read before function exit
rewrite: remove the store

precondition: store is overwritten before any read
rewrite: remove the overwritten store

precondition: two loads read the same unchanged slot
rewrite: reuse the first loaded value

precondition: alloca has no loads or stores
rewrite: remove the unused alloca

precondition: bounded loop has a header and latch
rewrite: canonicalize loop header structure

precondition: loop induction value is represented by a phi
rewrite: normalize induction representation

precondition: loop has a bounded simple trip count
rewrite: use the equivalent canonical trip count

precondition: operation is loop invariant
rewrite: hoist operation out of the loop

precondition: loop body instruction has no observable use
rewrite: remove the dead loop-body instruction

precondition: loop has an explicit bounded exit edge
rewrite: simplify equivalent loop exit structure

precondition: SLP tree contains same-opcode scalar binary operations with legal vector element type
rewrite: pack scalar operands, emit vector binary operation, and replace scalar users with lanes

precondition: SLP tree contains scalar reduction lanes with legal vector element type
rewrite: pack scalar lanes, emit vector reduction operation, and replace scalar reduction result

precondition: vector add has a zero splat operand
rewrite: replace vector add with the non-zero vector operand

precondition: vector multiply has a one splat operand
rewrite: replace vector multiply with the non-one vector operand

precondition: vector xor operands are the same value
rewrite: replace vector xor-self with a zero vector

precondition: shuffle mask preserves lane order
rewrite: replace identity shuffle with the source vector

precondition: shuffle mask selects the same lane for every result lane
rewrite: replace splat shuffle with a splat of the selected lane

precondition: extract reads the same lane that was just inserted
rewrite: replace extract(insert vector, value, lane) from the same lane with value

precondition: add-reduction input is a zero vector
rewrite: replace reduction add of zero vector with zero

precondition: vector subtract has a zero splat rhs
rewrite: replace vector subtract by zero with the lhs vector

precondition: vector or has a zero splat operand
rewrite: replace vector or with the non-zero vector operand

precondition: vector and has an all-ones splat operand
rewrite: replace vector and with the non-all-ones vector operand

precondition: vector signed min compares lanes pairwise
rewrite: preserve the lane-wise signed minimum result

precondition: vector signed max compares lanes pairwise
rewrite: preserve the lane-wise signed maximum result

precondition: vector unsigned min compares lanes pairwise
rewrite: preserve the lane-wise unsigned minimum result

precondition: vector unsigned max compares lanes pairwise
rewrite: preserve the lane-wise unsigned maximum result

precondition: vector absolute value negates negative lanes
rewrite: preserve the lane-wise absolute value result

precondition: insert writes back the value extracted from the same vector lane
rewrite: replace same-lane extract/insert round trip with the original vector

precondition: add-reduction input has one live lane and zero elsewhere
rewrite: replace reduction add with the live lane

precondition: scalable vector add has a zero splat operand
rewrite: replace scalable vector add with the non-zero operand

precondition: scalable vector multiply has a one splat operand
rewrite: replace scalable vector multiply with the non-one operand

precondition: scalable vector xor operands are the same value
rewrite: replace scalable vector xor-self with a zero vector

precondition: scalable vector subtract has a zero splat rhs
rewrite: replace scalable vector subtract by zero with the lhs

precondition: scalable vector or has a zero splat operand
rewrite: replace scalable vector or with the non-zero operand

precondition: scalable vector and has an all-ones splat operand
rewrite: replace scalable vector and with the non-all-ones operand

precondition: scalable add-reduction input is a zero vector
rewrite: replace scalable reduction add of zero vector with zero
